observation: sig15+ density 32.0% on 2026-03-01 (low-volume weekend, 2722 articles) preceded crash by 2 days. normal range 24-28%. low volume + high density = compression signal
both spiked 30%+ on 2/27-28, 1-2 days before crisis onset. both continued rising during crisis. candidate early-warning pair
still rising during market recovery phase (3/5-06). P_083 crossed 10% threshold. market rebounded 9.63% on 3/5 but these properties did not retreat
P_042 dropped -46% during crisis. co-occurs with diverse/routine news topics. drop correlates with news diversity collapse — when crisis dominates, routine news gets displaced

P_110 daily rate: 0.2% baseline → 1.8% on crash day. scorer ratio rose from 0.09 to 0.75 but still below 1.0 (no contribution). scorer window averaging may mask P_110 spike. P_110 co-occurrence with real estate keywords appeared 3/5 (23 articles)
score peaked 63.74 on 2/11, declined to 25.98 on crash day 3/3. score measures accumulated buildup over window, not trigger timing. peak-to-decline transition = trigger waiting zone, not safety

score accelerating post-crash: 25.98 (3/3) -> 40.0 (3/6). active properties 2/12 -> 11/12. market rebounded but score still climbing. score captures propagation phase, not trigger. if score reaches 50-60 range again, second wave signal.
scorer detection rate: 51.1% overall. by severity: minor(<3%)=50%, medium(3-5%)=50%, large(5-10%)=52%, crash(10%+)=62%. scorer improves with severity but still misses half of events.

scorer catches BUILDING crises (GFC 2008-07 onward, COVID 2020-03 onward, 2026 crisis) but misses SUDDEN shocks (2024-08 Japan carry trade score=8.7, 2008-01 GFC start score=0.0, 2020-01 COVID start score=0.0). scorer needs signal buildup time in frequency windows.
GFC 2008: score=0 (Jan) -> 13.4 (Jun) -> 37.3 (Jul) -> 54.2 (Oct crash) -> 100 (Nov). score PEAKED at 100 one month AFTER the worst crash (-33.9% Oct). same peak-lag pattern as 2026 crisis.

COVID: first shock 1/28 score=0.0, 2/24 score=15.1 (missed, -8.1%), 3/6 score=27.1 (detected, -30.1%). took 5 weeks for scorer to activate. the -8.1% drop on 2/24 was MISSED because signal had not built up yet.

2024-08-05: -12.1% drop (4th largest), score only 8.7. Japan carry trade unwind. this is the archetype BLIND SPOT: external sudden shock with no domestic news buildup. scorer structurally cannot detect this type.
score-to-drop correlation is 0.236 (weak). high score (>=30) avg drop=-5.2%, medium (18-30) avg drop=-4.6%, missed avg drop=-3.8%. score predicts PRESENCE of risk but not MAGNITUDE well.
score dip before crash: 2026 (30.5→3.0, 90% drop on 3/2), GFC (37→11, 70% drop in Sep 2008). both preceded major crashes within days. "signal vacuum" phenomenon.

2026 crisis triggered by US-Israel strikes on Iran (2/28). KOSPI crash 3/3 (-7.24%), 3/4 (-12.06%). Oil: WTI $81/bbl, Brent $84/bbl (pre-war ~$70, +20%). Scorer peaked 63.7 (2/11), dropped to 3.0 (3/2), then crash. P_055/P_083 still rising post-crash (3/6).
2026년 3월 대출환경: 기준금리 2.5% 유지, 2금융 6-9% 금리대, 대출한도 DSR 규제로 제한, 부동산 가격은 서울 +4.2% 예상되나 공급부족으로 전세난 심화
2026년 3월 위기: score 63.7(2/11)→3.0(3/2)→crash(3/3-4). 외부충격(이란전쟁) trigger를 국내 stress buildup(1-2월)이 증폭. P_055/P_083이 반도체주 폭락과 연동. 3/6 현재도 P_055(10.3%), P_083(10.2%) 상승중 — 전파단계 진행
2026년 금융 환경: 기준금리 2.5% 동결 지속, 가계부채 1978.8조원, DSR 스트레스 규제 강화, 2금융권 금리 6-9%대. 미국 금리인하 예상(4.0%→3.26%)에도 한국은 가계부채 부담으로 인하폭 제한적(2.5%→2.13% 예상)

Crisis fatigue (위기 피로감) creates new baseline: score 30-40 becomes "normal" instead of returning to <10. Human adaptation speed (4-6 weeks) cannot match financial contagion speed (hours), creating persistent stress state.
2026년 1월: KOSPI 5000 돌파 (역대 최초) → 3월 3-4일: -19.3% 폭락. 극적인 변동성 사이클. 반도체 호황(삼성+SK 70.8% 이익 기여) → 이란 전쟁 충격으로 붕괴
